or_note: Multiple -S on one rule OR together (f3 section 2.3); the rule fires on open OR openat OR openat2. All three are hot file-open syscalls (openat alone produced a 7284-line/2s burst, f3 section 3.5). The rule's volume is the SUM over the three syscalls, ~3x a single -S open. A model that counts 'one rule = one syscall' understates ~3x.

rules.note: 3 OR'd hot file-open syscalls. Volume = SUM over the three (~3x a single open). HIGH (f3 section 3.5 openat burst). 1200 B/event.

rate_band_basis: f3 section 6/3.5: hot file-open syscalls HIGH; band is the SUM over the 3 OR'd syscalls, ~3x single.
